name: Modify Table
desc: Modify an existing table with a single action per execution

parameters.name: Table
parameters.display: Table unique_id or name to modify

parameters.name: SingleName
parameters.display: New single name for the table records

parameters.name: Field
parameters.display: Field unique_id or column_name to update/remove

parameters.name: Value
parameters.display: Field Value from the available values

parameters.name: FieldPayload
parameters.display: JSON object with full field data for add/update
